# Installing Positron

We install Positron, take a tour of its main panels — the editor, console, environment, and plots pane — and run our first Python command. Download Positron at [positron.posit.co](https://positron.posit.co/).

::: {.callout-note}
You are welcome to use a different code editor if you already have one you are comfortable with — for example VS Code or PyCharm. The core content of this course
does not depend on Positron specifically. That said, the videos are recorded in Positron, so following along will be easiest if you use the same editor.
:::

*Video will be embedded here.*
